message:
🐛 Fix extractHostname reference error in HardwareHealthCard (#563)

Move deduplicatedNodeCount to be defined after extractHostname to
fix "Cannot access 'extractHostname' before initialization" error.

Also simplify deduplicatedNodeCount to directly use deduplicatedInventory.length
instead of recalculating with extractHostname.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
